The '''Cartao Expeditionary Army''' was the military task force sent by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] to subdue [[Cartao/Legends|Cartao]]. Led by [[Tok Ashel]], it was charged with taking [[Spaarti Creations]] without damaging the facility.

{{Military-stub}}
